title: polygala herbiola var. vitellina
intro: Polygala herbiola var. vitellina, also known as Violet Polygala, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Polygalaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including relief from asthma symptoms, improved respiratory function, and enhanced immune system response. In herbal preparations, Polygala herbiola var. vitellina is often combined with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to support respiratory health and overall well-being.
